text:
. 33 is a peculiar horoscope. Though six planets
are concentrated in the 10th, the native is not an entity and
is at present in humble circumstances. Lagna is aspected by
two malefics Saturn and Mars. Lord of Lagna is neecha and
is with Rahu, of course in the same sign. Lord of Lagna is
aspected by debilitated Sun (lord of 8), Jupiters (lord of 3
and 12), Ketu, Mercury (lord of 6 and 9), Mars lord of 4 and
11) and Venus. In the Navamsa again Saturn is with Ketu
aspected by Rahu and Mars as also Jupiter and Venus. All
the three factors pertaining to the 1st house are rather
unfortunately disposed. The native is tall, lean and reddish-
brown in colour. The body is thin and bony. Possesses
sympathy and generosity. Has good manners and puts on
superior airs. He has great

Concerning the First House 77
Chart No. 33.—Born on 31-10-1910 at 1-41 p.m.
(I.S.T.) Lot. 13" N., Long. 5h. 10m. 20s. E.
Balance of Mars Dasa at birth : Years 5-10-17.
